chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1698 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 03-11-2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner files counter-affidavit / Rejoinder against the Preliminary objections of Respondent No.4 along with certain documents, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned Additional AG. Counsel for the Petitioner submits that this Petition was preferred only with the prayer that the Representations / Applications of the Petitioner preferred to Respondent No.1/Secretary, Education and Literacy Department, Government of Sindh and Respondent No.6/ Registrar, Sukkur IBA University, Sukkur have not yet been decided. Learned Additional AG submits that the Representations/ Applications of the Petitioner, if any, are still pending, the same will be decided in accordance with the law. On such statement of learned AAG, Counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of instant Petition if directions are issued to Respondents No.1 and 6 to decide the Representations / Applications of the Petitioner within a shortest possible time. In the circumstances, the instant Constitutional petition is disposed of with direction to Respondent No.1/Secretary, Education and Literacy Department, Government of Sindh and Respondent No.6/ Registrar, IBA University, Sukkur to decide the Representations / Applications preferred by the Petitioner within 30 (thirty) days (if pending), after providing opportunity of hearing to all concerned in accordance with the law and submit such compliance report to this Court though Additional Registrar.

On such statement of learned AAG, Counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of instant Petition if directions are issued to Respondents No.1 and 6 to decide the Representations / Applications of the Petitioner within a shortest possible time. In the circumstances, the instant Constitutional petition is disposed of with direction to Respondent No.1/Secretary, Education and Literacy Department, Government of Sindh and Respondent No.6/ Registrar, IBA University, Sukkur to decide the Representations / Applications preferred by the Petitioner within 30 (thirty) days (if pending), after providing opportunity of hearing to all concerned in accordance with the law and submit such compliance report to this Court though Additional Registrar. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
